docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $828.00 FILED BY HUANG, MABEL AS TO DEFENDANT SAFEWAY, INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-24-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-24-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-24-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF MABEL HUANG WITH ASSISTANCE FROM COURT APPOINTED CANTONESE INTERPRETER BANNIE CHOW. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT SAFEWAY, INC'S REPRESENTATIVES: BRITTNEY MARTINEZ, HR SPECIALIST & LAURIE ROBERTSON, HR MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) FILED BY DEFENDANT SAFEWAY, INC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-24-2016 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUANG, MABEL AS TO DEFENDANT SAFEWAY, INC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-12-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SAFEWAY, INC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUANG, MABEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAFEWAY, INC (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
